# KRYVLayer

> KRYVLayer is an AI-powered programmatic SEO engine that generates thousands of unique landing pages automatically on any domain. Powered by NEHIRA AI.

## What KRYVLayer Does

KRYVLayer reads a business website URL, extracts relevant keywords and target cities using NEHIRA AI, then generates hundreds of unique, SEO-optimized HTML landing pages — all live on the user's own domain.

## Key Features

- Programmatic SEO page generation (100–1000 pages per domain)
- AI content generation powered by NEHIRA (vokryl.kryv.network)
- Multi-domain support per user account
- Real DNS verification via Cloudflare DNS-over-HTTPS
- Built-in analytics (views, top pages, domain stats)
- Weekly automated page regeneration via cron scheduler
- CSV export of all generated pages
- NEHIRA AI chat for SEO strategy advice
- Auto-generated XML sitemap and robots.txt

## API Endpoints

- POST /api/generate/auto — Generate pages for a domain
- POST /api/pages/bulk-generate — Bulk generate up to 1000 pages
- POST /api/analyze/website — Analyze website for keywords/cities
- POST /api/domains/create — Add new domain
- GET /api/domains/list — List user domains
- POST /api/domains/verify-dns — Check DNS connection
- GET /api/analytics/stats — Get platform statistics
- POST /api/nehira/ask — Chat with NEHIRA AI
- GET /api/export/csv — Export pages as CSV

## Technology Stack

- Next.js 15 (Pages Router)
- Neon Serverless Postgres
- NEHIRA AI (https://vokryl.kryv.network/api/nehira/chat)
- Deployed on Vercel

## Content Model

Each generated page includes:
- Full HTML with premium dark UI design
- Unique AI-written body content (300+ words)
- SEO title and meta description
- FAQ section
- Statistics section
- Call-to-action with link to original business website
- View tracking

## Target Users

SaaS founders, digital marketers, SEO agencies, and businesses that want to generate location-based or use-case-based landing pages at scale without writing content manually.
